sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Fixed a critical panic in the stop sequence decoder that occurred when processing multi-byte UTF-8 characters in stop sequences. The panic was caused by attempting to slice strings at invalid UTF-8 byte boundaries during partial match detection.

sglang.title: [Feature] Reuse flashinfer workspace for PD-Multiplexing.
sglang.author: ykcombat
sglang.bodyExcerpt:

When PD-Multiplexing enabled, there are multiple decode attention backends. These backends won't be active at the same time, they can share a flashinfer workspace. Subsequent PRs of PD-Multiplexing can be found  here.

sglang.title: Set CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES to achieve one GPU per process
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
We want to let one process only see one GPU, so that we can avoid some edge cases where one process accidentally allocates memory on other GPUs.
This is forced by setting CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES during the launch of each process

vllm.title: Update troubleshooting.md and remind VLLM_TRACE_FUNCTION usage
vllm.author: Prowindy
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Signed-off-by: Cong Chen congc@meta.com

Purpose
During a Deepseek V3 test on H200, by removing VLLM_TRACE_FUNCTION=1, tokens/s is improved from 0.5 to 400. By also removing --enforce-eager and adding --async-scheduling, decoding is further improved from 400 to 1800 tokens/s on 8xH200.
Test Plan
N/A

This is an unnecessary error message that complicates the model code. If there is an OOM error, a user can know which tensor is causing the OOM by pytorch's original error message. Also, OOM on a specific tensor doesn't have any actual meaning: it can be a previous tensor being

vllm.title: [BugFix][Core] Fix error when enable async-scheduling in multi-node env
vllm.author: lhtin
vllm.bodyExcerpt: When launching in a multi-node environment (e.g., TP16), the ParallelConfig automatically selects ray as the distributed_executor_backend. However, when async scheduling is enabled, it prematurely sets the default value of distributed_executor_backendto to mp, causing a launch failure like bellow. T

vllm.title: [Perf]  Add H100 fused MoE config
vllm.author: skyloevil
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Performance Improvement for FP8 MoE on H100 PCIe
Summary
This PR optimizes the FP8 MoE kernel configuration for NVIDIA H100 PCIe by updating the fused MoE configuration from E=128,N=384 to E=64,N=768 with FP8 support (dtype=fp8_w8a8). This change improves throughput for FP8 MoE models on H100 PCIe.

vllm.title: [CI/Build] tests(v1): feed Triton attention the (num_blocks, 2, …) KV cache layout in backend-correctness tests
vllm.author: hl475
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR makes K/V cache unbinding robust across cache layouts by detecting the axis of size 2 at runtime instead of assuming it sits at dim=1. This fixes unpacking errors seen when kv_cache is shaped with the K/V dimension elsewhere (e.g., dim=0).
When running tests tests/v1/attention/test_a

vllm.title: [GPT-OSS] Structure_Tag support for gpt-oss tool-call in cot
vllm.author: Hanchenli
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
The model sometimes generates function calls in CoT that have not been provided in tool_server. This PR uses structural tag to force model to 1. do not generate function calls when tool_server is not provided. 2. Only generate function that are present in the tool_server.
